label: Shadow carbon prices for EU/EIB project appraisal

eib_shadow_price.description: EIB shadow carbon price schedule aligned with 1.5C IPCC pathway. The most aggressive carbon price schedule among multilateral development banks.
eib_shadow_price.threshold: Applied to projects emitting > 20 ktCO2/year. Scope 3 included selectively for energy, transport, and industry.

eu_ets_reference.description: EU ETS market price reference. Actual market prices fluctuate; these are scenario-based reference values for appraisal.
eu_ets_reference.note: For EU Cohesion Policy CBA, use the higher of ETS market price or DG CLIMA shadow price for non-ETS sectors.

source.publication: EIB Project Carbon Footprint Methodologies; Economic Appraisal of Investment Projects at the EIB
source.update_frequency: aligned with Climate Bank Roadmap (~5 years)

caveats: EIB schedule is significantly higher than UK DESNZ or US EPA values
EU ETS market prices may diverge substantially from these shadow values
Schedule assumes 1.5C alignment; less ambitious pathways would yield lower values
